seo.title: About Us & Project Details
seo.desc: Luxera Towers; A brand new life vision rising in Istanbul Basın Ekspres with 369 luxury residences and a shopping mall with 87 stores.

hero.title: A New
hero.subtitle: An iconic architecture and a privileged life in the heart of Basın Ekspres, redefining the standards of luxury.

intro.p2: We are creating a fully equipped world with the freedom to reach everything you need within an elevator's distance, the opportunity to breathe in sky gardens, and commercial areas featuring international brands.
intro.p1: Luxera Towers is much more than just a housing project; It is a new generation living concept that blends the dynamism of Istanbul with aesthetics. In this project, where every detail has been carefully considered, luxury will no longer be a privilege, but your standard.

why.desc: Experience the privileged state of peace with views over the clouds while maintaining your connection to city life.

offersHeader.desc: Life at Luxera Towers means; It means a prestigious privilege where you manage your time with pleasure.

gardens.subtitle: Sky Gardens
gardens.desc: Multi-level green terraces placed between the towers offer a living breathing space in harmony with nature in the middle of the city. Landscaped social platforms and relaxation areas are a luxurious extension of your home.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Experience from the past, vision building the future.

vision.title: Our Vision and Values
vision.p1: Setting out with years of experience and confidence in the real estate industry, Luxera has adopted quality, aesthetics and durability as standards in every project. Rising in the most valuable location of Basın Ekspres, Luxera Towers is being implemented with the vision of becoming not only a housing project but also one of the new icons of Istanbul.
vision.p2: We aim to offer a "premium" living experience to everyone living in our projects with our innovative architectural approach, environmentally friendly sustainability principles and human-oriented design philosophy.

sustain.title: Sustainability & Certificates
sustain.subtitle: An understanding of life that is respectful to the future, environmentally conscious, and empowered by technology.

board.title: Message from the Board
board.quote: We build not just buildings, but enduring monuments to be proudly left to future generations. Luxera Towers is the brightest reflection of this vision.

Türkiye's most distinguished publishing houses will open stands at the Winter Book Days, which will be held in our shopping mall event area between 12-18 December. Additionally, a literary feast awaits you on weekends, with autograph sessions and interviews of our valuable writers. All our residents and visitors are invited.

teknoloji-zirvesi.body: The advanced smart home technologies (IoT) we used in the infrastructure of our project also attracted the attention of major players in the industry. Our project was examined as a case study at the "Future Living Spaces and IoT" summit held at Luxera Towers Congress Center last week. Our sustainability, energy efficiency and autonomous security systems received full marks from the participants.

hero.desc: We have compiled the most frequently asked details about Luxera Towers into categories so you can make your investment and lifestyle decisions with confidence.

cta.title: Your question not listed?
cta.desc: To get more detailed information about the project, visit our sample apartment, or create custom payment plans, please contact our expert sales consultants immediately.

search.placeholder: Search for a subject you are curious about... (eg: title deed, dues)
search.empty: No results were found matching your search.

q1.q: When will the title deed be delivered?
q1.a: In our project, our floor easement deeds are ready and the transfer is made immediately after the sales transactions.

q2.q: When will the project be delivered?
q2.a: The delivery date of our project is planned as the last quarter of 2026.

q3.q: What are the payment plan and installment options?
q3.a: In addition to special discounts for cash payment, promissory note payment within the company for up to 36 months and housing loan options with contracted banks are offered. You can contact our sales team for flexible plans tailored to you.

q4.q: What are the flat types and square meter ranges?
q4.a: There are 1+1, 2+1 and 3+1 flat types in our project. Square meters vary between 75 m² and 220 m².

q1.a: Yes. We provide end-to-end consultancy services for our foreign investors in title deed, tax and citizenship processes.

q2.a: Yes, our project is 100% eligible for the Turkish Citizenship program for purchases of 400,000 USD and above.

q3.q: Is rental management of commercial areas carried out?
q3.a: Yes, the rental and operation processes of commercial units (stores and offices) are supported by our professional management company. Professional "brand-mix" work is carried out for the stores in the shopping mall.

q4.q: What is the investment potential of the region?
q4.a: Basın Ekspres road is the fastest appreciating business and financial center of Istanbul. It promises high premiums and regular rental income with its new metro lines and E-5 / TEM connections.

q1.q: What will be included in the dues?
q1.a: 24/7 professional security, use of indoor parking, fitness and SPA areas (indoor swimming pool, Turkish bath, sauna), use of Executive Lounge and common area maintenance and landscaping expenses are included in the fee.

q2.q: What are the equipment standards for flat deliveries?
q2.a: All our apartments are built in accordance with international A+ quality standards. First-class built-in kitchen sets, smart home infrastructure, VRF air conditioning system and premium ceramic/parquet floor coverings are offered as standard.

q3.q: Are valet and housekeeping services paid?
q3.a: Our valet service is offered free of charge to residence residents, while personal services such as Housekeeping (dry cleaning, private cleaning, etc.) and room service are charged depending on usage (Pay-per-use system).

q4.q: Is there an electric vehicle charging station?
q4.a: Yes, a sufficient number of high-speed electric vehicle (EV) charging stations are available for the use of our residence residents on each floor of our indoor car park.

q1.q: Are there any advantages for cash payment?
q1.a: Yes. Period-specific discount rates are applied for cash payments. You can contact our sales team for current campaign conditions.

q2.q: Is payment by promissory note (deferred) possible?
q2.a: The company offers promissory note payment options of up to 36 months. Payment plan; It is structured specifically for you according to your down payment rate and maturity preference.

q3.q: Can I use a housing loan?
q3.a: Yes. It is possible to use a housing loan through our contracted banks. Our sales consultants will assist you in the appraisal and loan application process.

q4.q: What is the delivery date and delay?
q4.a: The delivery of our project is planned for the last quarter (Q4) of 2026. Delivery conditions and possible force majeure provisions are transparently included in your sales contract.

q1.q: How much is the structure and hardware warranty?
q1.a: Structural manufacturing works within the periods covered by the relevant legislation; Built-in products, mechanical and electrical systems are covered by the manufacturer/contractor warranty.

q2.a: Our professional facility management team meets your common area maintenance, technical service and malfunction requests 24/7 after delivery. Requests can also be submitted via the mobile application.

q3.a: All common areas (pool, fitness, lobby, landscaping, security) are operated by a professional site/facility management. Dues and service scope are defined in the management plan.

q1.q: How is the personal data I share protected?
q1.a: Your personal data is processed and stored securely only within the scope of sales, marketing and communication activities in accordance with KVKK No. 6698. Details are on our KVKK Information Text page.

q2.q: Is my information in the contact form shared with third parties?
q2.a: Your information is shared with our business partners only to the extent necessary to meet your request and within the framework of the conditions in Articles 8 and 9 of the KVKK. No unauthorized third party marketing.

q3.q: Can I request deletion of my data?
q3.a: Yes. In accordance with Article 11 of the KVKK, you have the right to learn whether your data is being processed and to request its correction or deletion. You can submit your requests in writing to our company headquarters.

q1.q: Are commercial units for rent or sale?
q1.a: The project has commercial units that can be both sold and rented. You can get information from our sales team about street shops, shopping mall stores, cafe/restaurant and office options.

q2.a: A professional brand-mix planning is carried out in shopping mall in-house units to maximize visitor experience and commercial efficiency. Retail, gastronomy, technology and service are positioned in a balanced manner.

q3.q: Is business management of commercial units supported?
q3.a: Yes. Our professional management company supports the rental, promotion and operation processes of commercial units; Rent tracking and occupancy management becomes easier for the investor.

seo.title: Investment and Value Appreciation
seo.desc: Istanbul's most profitable real estate investment with a 120% value increase forecast, short amortization period and guaranteed rental income.

hero.title: Add Value to
hero.subtitle: High return on investment, a safe harbor and a bright future await you with Luxera Towers rising in Basın Ekspres, the new golden axis of Istanbul.

intro.title: The New Maslak: Basin Ekspres
intro.p1: Basin Ekspres Road, the meeting point of international holding centers, 5-star hotel chains and huge trade centers, has been recorded as the fastest gaining location in Istanbul. With state-supported mega infrastructure projects and planned urbanization moves, the region has transformed from a mere transportation axis into a giant financial and living center.
intro.p2: This unique location, which connects the E-5 and TEM highways, passes through the M9 metro line and is directly integrated with Istanbul Airport, offers Luxera Towers investors an invaluable liquidity and demand assurance.

s1.title: Regional Value Appreciation
s1.desc: Continuously multiplying real estate value due to completed infrastructure projects and intense demand for the region.

s2.title: Targeted Amortization
s2.desc: Return on investment rate significantly below the Turkish average due to the synergy of commercial areas, mall, and residence mixed-use concept.

s3.title: Citizenship Threshold
s3.desc: Full compliance with the Turkish Citizenship by Investment program for foreign investors with a transparent legal process guarantee.

a1.title: Power of Mixed-Use Concept
a1.desc: Only projects that produce housing can be affected by crises. However, mixed projects with their own shopping malls, office blocks and commercial areas create a tremendous shield against crises by creating their own economy.

a2.title: Transportation Network Integration
a2.desc: Being able to take the metro the moment you leave your door, reaching Europe's largest airport in 25 minutes and connecting to E-5/TEM toll booths in minutes; It ensures that your tenant portfolio always consists of senior managers.

a3.title: International Brand Assurance
a3.desc: The reliability of the Luxera brand in the international arena, the project's high material standards, and on-time delivery guarantee provide a peaceful investment process by minimizing risks.

a4.title: High Rental Yield
a4.desc: Due to intense demand from plaza employees, airline personnel, and expat managers in the region, the vacancy rate is at a minimum while the foreign currency-based rental income potential is maximized.

cta.title: Professional Investment Consultancy
cta.desc: Every investor's profile and expectation is different. Our sales team is waiting to create the most suitable unit options and personalized payment plans for your budget, citizenship goals, and maturity plans.

cookies.title: Cookie
cookies.subtitle: Information about cookies used on our website
cookies.p1: As the Luxera Towers website, we use cookies to offer our visitors a better user experience, analyze site usage, and present personalized content.
cookies.p2: Cookies are small text files stored on your device or network server via your browser by the websites you visit.

l1.text: These are cookies absolutely necessary for the website to function properly and perform basic functions.

l2.text: These are cookies that help us analyze how visitors use our website and improve site performance (e.g., Google Analytics).

l3.text: These are cookies used to present advertisements and campaigns tailored to your interests.

cookies.p3: You can customize your cookie preferences by changing your browser settings. We would like to remind you that if you disable cookies, some features of our website may not function properly.

kvkk.title: GDPR
kvkk.subtitle: Clarification Text under the Personal Data Protection Law
kvkk.p2: Your collected personal data is processed by our company for the purposes of sales and marketing of our real estate projects, creating special campaigns for you, conducting customer satisfaction research, and carrying out communication activities.
kvkk.h2: 2. To Whom and For What Purpose Processed Personal Data Can Be Transferred
kvkk.h3: 3. Rights of the Personal Data Owner
kvkk.p1: Luxera Gayrimenkul Yatırım A.Ş. We show utmost sensitivity to the security of your personal data. With this awareness, we attach great importance to the processing and preservation of all personal data of all persons associated with the Company, including those who benefit from our products and services, in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK").
kvkk.p3: Your collected personal data; In line with the realization of the above-mentioned purposes, it may be transferred to our business partners, suppliers, legally authorized public institutions and private persons within the framework of the personal data processing conditions and purposes specified in Articles 8 and 9 of the KVKK.
kvkk.p4: In accordance with Article 11 of KVKK, data owners; They have the right to learn whether their personal data is being processed, to request information if they have been processed, to learn the purpose of processing, and to request correction if they have been processed incompletely or incorrectly. You can submit your requests in writing to our company headquarters.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Privacy Policy and Terms of Use
privacy.p1: This privacy policy explains how personal information of users visiting the Luxera Towers website is collected, used, and protected. By using our site, you are deemed to have accepted this policy.
privacy.p2: Information such as your name, surname, email, and phone number that you provide when filling out forms on our site (contact form, e-newsletter registration, etc.) is used solely to respond to you, inform you about our campaigns, and improve our service quality.
privacy.p3: All personal data you share with us is stored on secure servers and is never shared with third parties or institutions except for legal obligations. Industry-standard security measures are taken for your data security.

hero.subtitle: With Luxera Towers Shopping Mall and multi-layered social living spaces, Istanbul's new meeting point is taking shape right under your home.

intro.title: An Architecture of Life Beyond Boundaries
intro.p1: Instead of keeping up with the rhythm of the city, shape the city's rhythm around yourself. Luxera Towers is not just a residential area; it's a massive, self-sustaining ecosystem where architecture, nature, and commercial dynamism dance in perfect harmony.
intro.p2: After sipping your morning coffee at a distinguished cafe, you can take a walk on the open-air terraces bathed in sunlight, and in the evening, you can host your friends at a restaurant serving a selection of world cuisine. "Going out" here is as easy as simply opening the front door of your home.

cta.title: Get Your Time Back
cta.desc: Contact us to get closely acquainted with the Concierge privilege and Luxera Towers lifestyle.

concierge.desc: We know how valuable your time is. Life at Luxera Towers is designed so that all you have to do is enjoy yourself. Our professional concierge team is ready to meet all your requests at any time of the day.

fitness.desc: Show your body and soul the care they deserve. In the center of the city but far from its stress; our gym equipped with the latest technology and our luxury SPA center to help you purify are waiting for you.

f1.title: Fully Equipped Gym
f1.desc: Technogym's latest generation cardio and weight stations.

f2.title: Indoor Swimming Pool
f2.desc: Four-season heated and spacious indoor swimming pool.

f3.title: Premium SPA Center
f3.desc: Turkish bath, sauna, steam room, and personalized massage therapies.

f4.title: Private Trainer Support
f4.desc: One-on-one (Personal Trainer) fitness consultancy and pilates studios.

extras.title: An Oasis for Your Body and Soul
extras.p1: Whether to start the day energetically or to relieve the day's stress; whatever your need, everything you are looking for is just a few floors below your home.
extras.p2: After the heated indoor pool, Turkish bath, sauna, and steam room; experience total purification with personalized massage therapies.
extras.b3: Turkish bath, sauna, and steam room
extras.b4: One-on-one personal trainer and pilates studio

cta.title: Healthy Living Under Your Door
cta.desc: Book an appointment to experience the Fitness & SPA privilege and Luxera Towers lifestyle on-site.

housekeeping.desc: The perfection of your home is the most important detail of luxury living. We crown residence comfort with a cleaning and maintenance service at 5-star hotel standards, keeping your living spaces spotless at all times.

f1.title: Daily / Weekly Cleaning
f1.desc: Detailed general house cleaning and arrangement planned according to your request.

f2.title: Dry Cleaning & Ironing
f2.desc: Door-to-door dry cleaning service for your clothes and home textile products.

f3.title: Deep Hygiene
f3.desc: Periodically applied disinfection, sofa washing, and carpet care.

f4.title: Plant and Terrace Care
f4.desc: Professional care of your terrace, winter garden, and living room plants.

extras.title: A Home Always Ready to Host Guests
extras.p1: The order and hygiene of your home are the quietest but most decisive detail of luxury living. Our housekeeping team keeps your living spaces at 5-star hotel meticulousness.
extras.p2: From daily cleaning to dry cleaning, from terrace plant care to deep hygiene; you just enjoy it, leave the rest to us.
extras.b1: Planned daily or weekly general cleaning
extras.b3: Periodic disinfection, sofa, and carpet care
extras.b4: Maintenance of terrace, winter garden, and living room plants

cta.title: Pristine Living Spaces
cta.desc: Contact us to get closely acquainted with the Housekeeping privilege and Luxera Towers lifestyle.

lounge.desc: Exclusive lounge and club areas designed for you to host your guests, hold business meetings, or just enjoy a quiet coffee.

f1.title: Business Lounge
f1.desc: Meeting rooms, high-speed internet, and quiet working areas equipped with office amenities.

f2.title: Cigar & Wine Club
f2.desc: An elegant space decorated with special climate cabinets and comfortable leather armchairs.

f3.title: Private Dining Room
f3.desc: Private dining rooms supported by chef service where you can host your special guests.

f4.title: Game & Cinema Room
f4.desc: Private cinema hall and entertainment areas equipped with latest tech game consoles.

extras.title: Your New Social Networking Area
extras.p1: Luxera Club Lounge was designed as an exclusive platform that brings together an elite community and meets your business and entertainment needs.
extras.p2: Whether closing an important business deal, hosting a crowded dinner, or watching a movie with your family; all possibilities are reserved for you.
extras.b1: Fully equipped meeting and business lounge
extras.b3: Private dining room with VIP chef service
extras.b4: Private cinema and high-tech game room

cta.title: The Privilege of Being Exclusive
cta.desc: Book an appointment to experience the Lounge privilege and Luxera Towers lifestyle on-site.

security.desc: Your peace of mind is our priority. We offer a safe and peaceful living environment with smart building technologies, a 24/7 active security team, and multi-layered access control systems.

f1.title: 24/7 Security Team
f1.desc: A professional and trained security team constantly monitoring the project site.

f2.title: CCTV Camera System
f2.desc: Continuous monitoring of all common areas, parking lots, and environmental perimeters.

f3.title: Smart Access Control
f3.desc: Card, fingerprint, or mobile app access systems at building entrances and elevators.

f4.title: Fire & Emergency
f4.desc: Advanced fire detection, extinguishing systems, and emergency evacuation protocols.

extras.title: Invisible Shield, Absolute Peace
extras.p1: Our security systems work seamlessly in the background without disturbing your comfort and privacy.
extras.p2: With our smart home infrastructure, you can manage the security of your home via your mobile phone, define temporary access codes for your guests, and track everything instantly.
extras.b2: Comprehensive CCTV monitoring and recording system
extras.b4: Mobile integrated guest and delivery tracking

cta.title: Live in Peace
cta.desc: Contact us to get closely acquainted with our Security privileges and the Luxera Towers lifestyle.

s1.title: Earthquake Safety
s1.desc: Fully compatible with the latest earthquake regulations; It was built to high engineering standards, reinforced with bored pile and raft foundation system.

s2.title: Fire & Leak Protection
s2.desc: Full protection with water and gas leak detectors, automatic fire extinguishing and smoke evacuation systems.

s1.title: Home Automation System
s1.desc: Manage your air conditioning, lighting, security and curtain systems from a single panel or from your smartphone wherever you are in the world.

valet.desc: Say goodbye to parking stress. Our professional valet team meets your vehicle at the door and brings it safely to the lobby door when you leave.

f1.title: 24/7 Valet Service
f1.desc: Uninterrupted vehicle reception and delivery service whenever you arrive or leave.

f2.title: Mobile Request
f2.desc: Ability to request your vehicle in advance via the resident portal without waiting.

f3.title: Guest Valet
f3.desc: Privileged valet service for your visitors.

f4.title: Safe Parking
f4.desc: Your vehicle is safely parked in the closed parking lot reserved for you.

extras.title: Time is Your Most Valuable Asset
extras.p1: You don't need to waste time looking for a parking spot at Luxera Towers. Our valet team meets you at the main entrance and parks your vehicle safely.
extras.p2: When you are leaving, you can call your vehicle to the door with a single click via our mobile application and get directly on the road without waiting.
extras.b2: Quick vehicle call via mobile app
extras.b3: Safe indoor parking and VIP guest hosting

cta.title: Comfort Starting at the Door
cta.desc: Book an appointment to experience the Valet privilege and Luxera Towers lifestyle on-site.

hero.title: Peak of
hero.subtitle: Prestigious living spaces designed just for you, where you will find reflections of fine taste and superior engineering in every square metre.

f1.title: Smart Home Technologies
f1.desc: Control lighting, climate, and security with a single touch from your tablet or smartphone.

f2.title: Premium Materials
f2.desc: First-class natural stone, imported parquet, and custom-designed kitchen cabinets.

f3.title: Panoramic Views
f3.desc: Floor-to-ceiling windows, 3.20m ceiling height, and uninterrupted city views.

f4.title: Spacious Balconies & Terraces
f4.desc: Large balconies that breathe with the city and integrate with sky gardens.

cta.desc: Contact our expert sales consultants to determine the flat type and payment plan that best suits you.

step1.desc: Contact our sales consultant and share your needs and expectations.

step2.title: Sample Flat Tour
step2.desc: Tour our sample flat on site and experience the materials and view.

step3.desc: Determine the apartment and payment plan that suits you and complete the contract.

step4.title: Delivery
step4.desc: Start your life with the turnkey process and beyond.

seo.title: Residence and Floor Plans
seo.desc: Luxury residence flat options with 3.20m ceiling height and detailed floor plans that appeal to different lifestyles.

philosophy.title: Our Interior Philosophy
philosophy.heading: Elegance from Tradition to the Future
philosophy.p2: First-class Italian ceramics used in the kitchen and wet floors add warmth to the space by creating a perfect contrast with the natural solid wood details that greet you in the entrance. Thanks to the acoustic barriers used in sound insulation, absolute silence reigns in your home even though you are in the heart of the city.
philosophy.f1: Underfloor heating and VRV cooling systems
philosophy.f2: Smart Home Infrastructure that can be managed from mobile devices
philosophy.f3: Panoramic insulated windows extending from ceiling to floor
philosophy.p1: Luxera Towers' interior design is inspired by the silent, yet deeply felt power of luxury. Breaking standards, ceiling heights of 3.20 meters create a spacious atmosphere that will take away all your tiredness the moment you step into the house.

process.title: Purchasing Journey
process.subtitle: From the first meeting to key delivery, the process is managed simply and transparently for you.

1+1.title: 1+1 Residence
1+1.desc: Modern compact comfort for young professionals and those who love dynamic life.

2+1.title: 2+1 Residence
2+1.desc: Balanced and spacious living, ideal for newlywed couples and small families.

3+1.title: 3+1 Residence
3+1.desc: Spacious, scenic and prestigious living space for large families.

4+1.title: 4+1 Penthouse
4+1.desc: Luxury without limits; Privileged life intertwined with the sky on the top floors.

req2.desc: Water accumulates on the kitchen counter.

support.seo_desc: 24/7 technical and concierge services exclusively for Luxera Towers residents.
support.hero_subtitle: Professional support team ready 24/7 for all your needs in your living space.
support.section_subtitle: Is there a technical malfunction? Or is it your dry cleaning request? Our team is just a click away.

s1.title: Instant Technical Service
s1.desc: In case of any malfunction in electricity, plumbing, air conditioning or smart home systems, create your request in seconds by adding a photo via the digital portal.

s2.title: 24/7 Concierge
s2.desc: All the details that make your life easier, from taxi calls to dry cleaning, from house cleaning to reservations, are on a single panel.

cta.title: Create New Request
cta.desc: You can instantly add all your technical support, fault reporting and concierge requests to our technical team's work queue by logging in via Apsiyon.

services.subtitle: Privileged digital services offered to make your life easier.

marquee.m3: NEW YEAR JAZZ CONCERT AT THE LOBBY LOUNGE, DECEMBER 25.

step3.desc: Valet, housekeeping, reservation or organization; The service is carried out meticulously.

step4.title: satisfaction
step4.desc: Rate your experience; We constantly improve our service standards for you.

concierge.title: 24/7 Concierge
concierge.desc: Our professional team organizes every detail, from flight ticket reservations to special event planning, just so you can enjoy life.

security.title: Private Security
security.desc: Your family is always safe with smart building technologies, closed circuit camera systems (CCTV) and professional security personnel on patrol 24/7.

valet.title: Valet & Parking
valet.desc: Valet service where you can safely deliver your car and dedicated parking areas with license plate recognition system, only for residents.

fitness.title: Fitness & SPA
fitness.desc: State-of-the-art fitness equipment to start the day energetically and a luxuriously designed SPA center to relieve the stress of the day.

housekeeping.title: housekeeping
housekeeping.desc: Your residence is always ready to welcome guests with cleaning, dry cleaning and ironing services at 5-star hotel standards.

lounge.title: Lounge Area
lounge.desc: Private lobby and lounge with high ceilings where you can hold your business meetings and host your guests in a prestigious environment.

intro.title: Services That Bring Hotel Comfort to Your Home
intro.p1: We believe that true luxury is not hidden in the shine of things, but in how easy it makes life. At Luxera Towers, we promise to give you that "special for me" feeling you feel when you enter the lobby of a 5-star hotel, every day when you step into your home.
intro.p2: You can either hand your car over to the valet after a tiring day at work, or start your day with your instructor early in the morning. All our services are designed to leave you the luxury of simply "enjoying life".

process.title: It is Very Easy to Access the Service
process.subtitle: A single request turns into a seamless experience. Leave the rest to the Luxera team.

cta.title: Experience Hotel Comfort in Your Home
cta.desc: Contact us to experience Luxera Towers privileges and service standards closely.

o1.desc: The global management center where the Luxera brand carries out its international investments and fund management.

d1.desc: World famous steakhouse experience and unique meat flavors.

d2.desc: Premium coffee beans, special brewing methods and stylish atmosphere.

d3.desc: An elegant meeting of traditional Turkish and modern world cuisine.

d4.desc: Luxury desserts and drinks made with original Belgian chocolate.

d5.desc: The most prestigious, award-winning representative of modern Japanese cuisine.

t1.quote: I can leave the gym in the morning and take the elevator down to my office floor. Luxera Towers truly "takes life down to one step". The time I spend with my family has doubled.

t2.quote: I have been following the rise of the Basın Ekspres district for years. The mixed concept and proximity to the metro offer together the liquidity and rental security I am looking for. It was the right decision at the right time.

t3.quote: Visibility on the street and pedestrian traffic in the shopping mall increased the awareness of our brand from the first month. The commercial potential of the location exceeded our expectations.

t4.quote: Thanks to the 3.20-meter ceilings and panoramic windows, the noise of the city is left behind as soon as I enter the house. The concierge team handles every request with one phone call; Hotel comfort at home.

t5.quote: The entire citizenship and title deed process was managed end-to-end. There was transparent and prompt communication throughout the process; It was a reassuring experience for my first investment in Istanbul.

t6.quote: Our location on the terrace floor has become a meeting point for both residence residents and local guests. Correct brand-mix planning added value to our business.

p1.title: The New Icon of Basın Ekspres is Rising
p1.desc: Luxera Towers draws attention with its innovative design that changes the architectural silhouette of the region.

p2.title: New Favorite of Investors
p2.desc: Luxera Towers stands out with its short amortization period and high return potential.

p3.title: Luxury and Comfort Together
p3.desc: It is a complete living center with its extensive social facilities and prestigious commercial areas.

p4.title: A Project at the Heart of Transportation
p4.desc: Only 200 meters from Güneşli Metro Station makes the project unrivaled in terms of transportation.

p5.title: The New Standard in Mixed Living Projects
p5.desc: Bringing together the residence and shopping mall concept, Luxera Towers leads the sector.

p6.title: Basın Ekspres is on the Rise
p6.desc: Luxera Towers takes the lead among the projects that are the locomotive of transformation in the region.
